name: Kluay Tord
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly mix the beaten eggs with the palm sugar.
2. Add the rice flour, shredded coconut and ice water to the egg mixture and stir until well combined.
3. Peel the bananas and cut them in half lengthwise, then crosswise. Dip each banana piece into the batter, coating it evenly.
4. Heat the vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat. Carefully add the coated banana pieces, ensuring they are fully submerged in oil. Cook until crispy and browned, turning once during cooking.
5. Using a slotted spoon or spatula, remove the cooked bananas from the oil and drain on paper towels.
6. Serve immediately.
